title: pelargonium × anthriscifolium
intro: Pelargonium × anthriscifolium, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Pelargonium genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which has antimicrobial and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Rose Geranium include essential oils, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used in aromatherapy, skincare, and traditional medicine.
